  "claims": [
    "AB 1079 establishes the Hate Crimes Intervention Program within the State Department of Public Health.",
    "The Hate Crimes Intervention Program aims to create a bridge between government agencies, community leaders, and organizations in communities most affected by hate crimes.",
    "AB 1079 implements evidence-based community interventions to provide support for victims of hate crimes.",
